scripts.setup: npm run setup:api && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:worker
scripts.setup:api: docker compose up -d postgres redis && docker compose run --rm api bash -lc "bundle exec rails db:prepare"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,WEB,WORKER -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:worker"
